metadata.description: 24 AI skills for the Valkey ecosystem - install only what you need

plugins.name: valkey
plugins.description: Use when building apps with Valkey - caching, sessions, queues, locks, rate-limiting, leaderboards, counters, pub-sub, streams, scripting. Covers IFEQ/DELIFEQ, hash field TTL, COMMANDLOG.

plugins.name: valkey-ops
plugins.description: Use when deploying, configuring, monitoring, or troubleshooting self-hosted Valkey. Covers Sentinel, cluster, persistence, replication, security, Kubernetes, performance tuning.

plugins.name: valkey-dev
plugins.description: Use when contributing to the Valkey server - C internals, event loop, commands, data structures, cluster, replication, RDB/AOF, memory, threading, modules, Lua, RESP, tests.

plugins.name: glide-dev
plugins.description: Use when contributing to the GLIDE client - Rust core internals, language bindings (PyO3/JNI/NAPI/CGO/FFI), protocol layer, PubSub synchronizer, cluster topology, and build system.

plugins.name: valkey-search-dev
plugins.description: Use when contributing to valkey-io/valkey-search - C++ internals, HNSW/FLAT vector indexes, full-text/numeric/tag indexes, query engine, cluster coordinator, build.

plugins.name: valkey-bloom-dev
plugins.description: Use when contributing to valkey-io/valkey-bloom source - Rust bloom filter internals, building, testing, RDB/AOF, replication, or reviewing PRs.

plugins.name: valkey-glide
plugins.description: Router for Valkey GLIDE per-language skills. Use when you need to find the right language-specific GLIDE skill or migration skill.

plugins.name: valkey-glide-python
plugins.description: Use when building Python apps with Valkey GLIDE - async/sync APIs, GlideClient, GlideClusterClient, asyncio, TLS, OpenTelemetry, batching, PubSub, streams, Lua scripting.

plugins.name: valkey-glide-java
plugins.description: Use when building Java apps with Valkey GLIDE - CompletableFuture API, GlideClient, GlideClusterClient, Batch, TLS, OpenTelemetry, streams, Lua scripting.

plugins.name: valkey-glide-nodejs
plugins.description: Use when building Node.js/TypeScript apps with Valkey GLIDE - Promise API, GlideClient, TypeScript types, ESM/CJS, TLS, OpenTelemetry, Batch, PubSub, streams.

plugins.name: valkey-glide-go
plugins.description: Use when building Go apps with Valkey GLIDE - synchronous API, Client/ClusterClient, CGO bridge, Result[T] types, Batch, streams, TLS, OpenTelemetry, Lua scripting.

plugins.name: valkey-glide-csharp
plugins.description: Use when building C#/.NET apps with Valkey GLIDE - async/await API, .NET 8.0+ (preview), GlideClient, configuration builders, TLS, PubSub.

plugins.name: valkey-glide-php
plugins.description: Use when building PHP apps with Valkey GLIDE - synchronous C extension API (PHP 8.1+), PIE/Composer/PECL install, GlideClient, batching, phpredis compat, PubSub, TLS.

plugins.name: valkey-glide-ruby
plugins.description: Use when building Ruby apps with Valkey GLIDE - valkey-rb gem (GA), redis-rb drop-in replacement, FFI bridge, PubSub, pipelining, OpenTelemetry, TLS.

plugins.name: migrate-jedis
plugins.description: Use when migrating Java from Jedis to Valkey GLIDE. Covers zero-code-change compatibility layer, native CompletableFuture rewrite, PubSub, Batch API, cluster mode.

plugins.name: migrate-lettuce
plugins.description: Use when migrating Java from Lettuce to Valkey GLIDE. Covers Spring Data Valkey path, native rewrite from RedisFuture to CompletableFuture, PubSub, no reactive API or codec equivalent.

plugins.name: migrate-ioredis
plugins.description: Use when migrating Node.js from ioredis to Valkey GLIDE. Covers API mapping, creation-time PubSub, reversed publish args, Batch API, TypeScript types.

plugins.name: migrate-redis-py
plugins.description: Use when migrating Python from redis-py to Valkey GLIDE. Covers async-first API, bytes returns (no decode_responses), list args, PubSub, ExpirySet/ConditionalChange.

plugins.name: migrate-go-redis
plugins.description: Use when migrating Go from go-redis to Valkey GLIDE. Covers Result[T] nil handling, CGO dependency, PubSub, SetWithOptions, Alpine/MUSL gotchas.

plugins.name: migrate-stackexchange
plugins.description: Use when migrating C#/.NET from StackExchange.Redis to Valkey GLIDE. Covers API mapping, async/await Task, no IDatabase layer, PubSub, Batch API (.NET 8.0+, preview).

plugins.name: spring-data-valkey
plugins.description: Use when integrating Spring Boot with Valkey via Spring Data Valkey. Covers auto-configuration, ValkeyTemplate, caching, Actuator health, IAM auth, Spring Data Redis migration.

plugins.name: glide-mq
plugins.description: Use when building message queues with glide-mq. Covers queue setup, producer/consumer patterns, job scheduling, workflows, batch processing, streaming, and suspend/resume.

plugins.name: glide-mq-migrate-bullmq
plugins.description: Use when migrating BullMQ applications to glide-mq. Covers connection conversion, API mapping, and breaking changes.

plugins.name: glide-mq-migrate-bee
plugins.description: Use when migrating Bee-Queue applications to glide-mq. Covers chained builder to options object conversion, API mapping, and architectural changes.
